description: BDR.ai is a free AI-powered sales automation tool that automates up to 75% of repetitive outreach tasks, including calls, emails, and social media prospecting.
overview: BDR.ai is a free AI-powered platform that automates prospecting, digital dialing, and email outreach for B2B sales and business development teams. By handling up to 75% of repetitive sales tasks, it helps teams fill their pipeline faster without proportionally increasing headcount or cost.
what_is: BDR.ai is a free AI-powered B2B lead generation and sales automation platform designed for sales and business development teams. It automates up to 75% of repetitive prospecting tasks, covering areas such as lead discovery, real-time data enrichment, email outreach, and digital dialing, so reps can focus more time on conversations and less on manual research.

The platform performs well in scenarios that require efficient lead prospecting, multi-channel digital outreach, and continuous pipeline building at a lower per-lead cost. Users can typically begin connecting with prospects shortly after setup, with AI-driven targeting helping surface relevant contacts and automation handling the initial engagement steps.

BDR.ai integrates with CRM and email systems to keep lead data enriched and workflows moving without manual hand-offs. It functions as a sales acceleration tool focused on lead generation and pipeline growth rather than customer support or detailed marketing analytics, and it pairs best with platforms that handle those downstream activities.
